# `tap`

Tap an element by its ref ID from the snapshot. Use the short hash ref shown in square brackets (e.g., y778 from [y778] "Network & internet"). These refs are stable across captures of the same screen. To enter a value on a number pad, PIN pad, or keypad, tap each digit button.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.toolcalls.commands.TapTrailblazeTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: no (`is_recordable: false`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `ref` — `String`
  The element ref from the snapshot (e.g., 'y778')

### Optional parameters

- `longPress` — `Boolean`
  Set to true for a long press instead of a tap.
- `reasoning` — `String`

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)

Typed result schemas (`kind: query | action`, MCP `structuredContent`) are not yet carried by the resolved manifest — this section will gain detail when that lands.
